pattern: Splitting the score into a left term (value plus index) and a right term (value minus index) lets one pass carry the best left term seen so far and combine it with each right term.
hints: Rewrite values[i] + values[j] + i - j as (values[i] + i) + (values[j] - j); the two halves depend only on i and only on j respectively.
As you move j forward, the best possible left partner is the maximum of values[i] + i over all earlier i — you can keep that running maximum.
Scan once tracking best = max(values[i] + i); at each j update the answer with best + values[j] - j, then refresh best with values[j] + j.

edge_inputs.description: large early value but far apart from the next big one

stress.description: long random array to break any quadratic pair scan
